omniProcessElements.name: ParkDocumentGenerationApex
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationFormDetails:UseOfPublicPark:EventParkSpaceRequire% == \"Yes\" || %DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationFormDetails:UseOfPublicPark:EventParkSpaceRequireWithoutEvent% == \"Yes\" ", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "documentName" : "=DFDFWGetParkPermitDocumentTemplate:ParkDocumentTemplate:parkPermitDocName", "mainId" : "%ContextId%", "EventParkSpaceRequire" : "%DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationFormDetails:UseOfPublicPark:EventParkSpaceRequire%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "ParkTransformOmniInputForPayload", "remoteClass" : "DFDFW_DocumentGeneration", "remoteOptions" : { }, "remoteMethod" : "generateDocument", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "RemoteAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: ParkTransformOmniInputForPayload
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "applicationName" : "=DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationName", "applicationSubmissionDate" : "=DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationSubmissionDate" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationFormDetails", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DFDFWGetParkApplicationTransform", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: SpecialEventDocumentGenerationApex
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationFormDetails:UseOfPublicPark:EventParkSpaceRequireWithoutEvent% == \"Yes\" || %DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationFormDetails:UseOfPublicPark:EventParkSpaceRequire% == \"Yes\" ", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "documentName" : "=GetSpecialEventDocumentTemplate:SpecialDocumentTemplate:specialEventDocName", "mainId" : "%ContextId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "SpecialEventTransformOmniInputForPayload", "remoteClass" : "DFDFW_DocumentGeneration", "remoteOptions" : { }, "remoteMethod" : "generateDocument", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "RemoteAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: SpecialEventTransformOmniInputForPayload
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "applicationName" : "=DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationName", "applicationSubmissionDate" : "=DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationSubmissionDate" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationFormDetails", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DFDFWGetSpecialEventTransform", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: SpecialEventWithoutParkDocumentGenerationApex
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationFormDetails:UseOfPublicPark:EventParkSpaceRequireWithoutEvent% == \"No\"", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "documentName" : "=DFDFWGetSpecialEventWithoutParkDocumentTemplate:SpecialDocumentWithoutParkTemplate:specialEventDocName", "mainId" : "%ContextId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "SpecialEventWithoutParkTransformOmniInputForPayload", "remoteClass" : "DFDFW_DocumentGeneration", "remoteOptions" : { }, "remoteMethod" : "generateDocument", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "RemoteAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: SpecialEventWithoutParkTransformOmniInputForPayload
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "applicationName" : "=DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationName", "applicationSubmissionDate" : "=DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationSubmissionDate" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationFormDetails", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DFDFWGetSpecialEventTransform", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: StreetDocumentGenerationApex
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationFormDetails:UsePublicStreets:EventClose% == \"Yes\" || %DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationFormDetails:UsePublicStreets:EventCloseWithoutEventType% == \"Yes\"", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "documentName" : "=DFDFWGetStreetPermitDocumentTemplate:StreetDocumentTemplate:streetPermitDocName", "mainId" : "%ContextId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "StreetTransformOmniInputForPayload", "remoteClass" : "DFDFW_DocumentGeneration", "remoteOptions" : { }, "remoteMethod" : "generateDocument", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "RemoteAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: StreetTransformOmniInputForPayload
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "applicationName" : "=DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationName", "applicationSubmissionDate" : "=DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationSubmissionDate" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "DFDFWGetServiceApplicationId:applicationFormDetails", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DFDFWGetStreetPermitTransform", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }
